titles.text: パワプロクンポケット 13

descriptions.text: Power Pro-kun Pocket 13 is a 2010 Baseball simulator + visual novel - card game + turn-based RPG developed by Pawapuro Production, formerly Diamond Head, and published by Konami for the Nintendo DS. Players can now create one custom character after another by betting on a scratch card minigame and the Baseball simulator can be played with realistic 3D models. The Card Baseball system is gone.
